title: Create evening-task-triage
description: Triage multiple end-of-day tasks: capture, prioritize, time-estimate, persist to dated plan, fact-check external guides, schedule follow-ups.
goal: Capture the meta-workflow practiced in late-evening sessions: convert chaotic task dump into a dated, persisted, evolvable plan; fact-check external instructions; schedule follow-ups; sign off cleanly.
evidence: Practiced 2026-06-15 evening with user: 6 tasks captured across 2 rounds, external Docker guide fact-checked against official OpenClaw docs, corrected plan persisted, cron reminder set, skill proposal written.
